JAMMI PHARMA PARTNER PROGRAMME

Your Clinic. Our Formulations.
Shared Success.

Partner with India’s oldest Ayurvedic pharmaceutical house. Add Jammi’s 128-year, AYUSH-licensed product line to your practice. Earn healthy margins. Give your patients medicine that works.

APPLY TO PARTNER

How It Works

1

Apply

Fill in a short application. We verify your qualifications and clinic. Approval within 72 hours.

2

Onboard

Receive your wholesale price list, product catalog, and clinic branding kit. Place your first order at partner pricing.

3

Prescribe & Earn

Prescribe Jammi formulations to your patients. Dispense directly from your clinic. The margin is your revenue.

100+
Formulations Available
128
Years of Clinical Use
25–30%
Partner Margin Range
None
Minimum Order
Pan-India
Delivery Coverage
AYUSH / GMP
Licensing

What You Get

check_circle

Wholesale Pricing

25–30% below MRP on all Jammi products. The full margin stays with you.

check_circle

100+ Formulations

Liver care, skin & hair, therapeutics, rasayanas, thailams, ghritams, and more. Complete Ayurvedic pharmacopoeia under one brand.

check_circle

Zero Inventory Risk

No minimum order. No stocking requirement. Order as you prescribe. We deliver pan-India.

check_circle

AYUSH Compliance

Every product fully licensed under AYUSH regulations. GMP-certified manufacturing. You prescribe with complete regulatory confidence.

check_circle

Clinic Branding Kit

"Jammi Authorised Partner" signage for your clinic. Product display materials. Patient information leaflets. Branded prescription pad templates.

check_circle

Marketing Support

Featured on jammi.in as an authorised partner. Social media co-promotion. Local SEO support. Patient referrals from the Jammi platform to your clinic.

check_circle

Clinical Knowledge

Access to Jammi’s 128-year formulation knowledge base. Dosage protocols, contraindications, combination guides — all documented by three generations of practitioners.

check_circle

Dedicated Support

Partner WhatsApp group with direct access to the Jammi clinical team. Order support. Product queries. Clinical discussions with fellow partner practitioners.

What Jammi Gets

This is not a one-sided relationship. When you succeed, Jammi succeeds. When Jammi’s products heal your patients, your reputation grows. This is the definition of win-win.

FROM YOU

You prescribe and dispense Jammi products

THE VALUE TO JAMMI

Expanded distribution without retail overhead

FROM YOU

Your clinical credibility endorses the product

THE VALUE TO JAMMI

Doctor-recommended trust that no advertisement can buy

FROM YOU

You share patient feedback and clinical outcomes

THE VALUE TO JAMMI

Real-world efficacy data that strengthens the formulary

FROM YOU

Your clinic displays Jammi branding

THE VALUE TO JAMMI

Brand visibility in locations where patients make decisions

FROM YOU

You grow your practice using our products

THE VALUE TO JAMMI

We grow our reach through your practice

The Jammi Formulary

100+ proven formulations. A complete Ayurvedic pharmacopoeia under one trusted brand.

medical_services

Liver Care

Flagship. The legendary LiverCure and related formulations.

VIEW CATEGORY arrow_forward
face_retouching_natural

Skin & Hair Care

Kumkumadi, Neelibringadi, and traditional beauty therapeutics.

VIEW CATEGORY arrow_forward
local_florist

Rasayanas & Tonics

Chyawanprash, Ashwagandha Rasayana, rejuvenation formulations.

VIEW CATEGORY arrow_forward
water_drop

Thailams (Oils)

Dhanwantharam, Kottamchukkadi, and therapeutic massage oils.

VIEW CATEGORY arrow_forward
spa

Ghritams (Ghee-based)

Brahmi Ghritam, Triphala Ghritam, neurological and digestive formulations.

VIEW CATEGORY arrow_forward
health_and_safety

General Therapeutics

Digestive, respiratory, musculoskeletal, and chronic condition formulations.

VIEW CATEGORY arrow_forward

Provide your details below to begin the partnership process.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

No. Partnership is free. You simply buy products at wholesale and sell at MRP. The margin is your earning.

There is no minimum order. Order what you need for your current patients. We deliver pan-India.

Standard delivery within 5–7 business days. Express options available for urgent requirements.

Yes, unopened products within shelf life can be returned. Details in the partner agreement.

We do not enforce exclusive territories. Multiple practitioners in a city can be partners. Your clinical skill and patient relationships are your competitive advantage, not artificial scarcity.

The Jammi Partner Programme is a commercial product partnership. The JAM Federation is a cooperative movement with democratic governance. You can be a product partner without joining the federation, or do both. Many partners choose to join the federation for the additional benefits of community, education, and collective advocacy.

self_improvement

Charak

Ayurvedic AI Assistant

Namaste. I am Charak, your Ayurvedic AI guide. How can I assist you with Jammi Pharmaceuticals today?
